Container.Name: discord-mute-bot
Container.Overview: Discord bot with slash commands for muting, vote-muting, russian roulette, reaction roles, Minecraft server up/down announcements, AMP Minecraft server control (start/stop/restart), and music playback from YouTube/SoundCloud/Spotify (requires a separate Lavalink container). Runs on Node.js with low resource usage (~30-40 MB RAM, audio offloaded to Lavalink).

Config.Name: Bot Token
Config.Description: Your Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for reaction role and Minecraft watch configs. Required so configuration survives container restarts and updates.

Config.Name: AMP URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your AMP instance used for /mcserver (e.g. http://tower.local:8080). Leave blank to disable /mcserver.

Config.Name: AMP Username
Config.Description: AMP username for the bot to log in as. Recommend a dedicated AMP user without 2FA and only the Start/Stop/Restart permissions needed.

Config.Name: AMP Password
Config.Description: Password for the AMP user above.

Config.Name: AMP Instance
Config.Description: When using AMP ADS: the instance name (e.g. 'cobblemon') or its GUID. Leave blank when pointing AMP_URL directly at a standalone instance.

Config.Name: Lavalink Host
Config.Description: Hostname/IP of the Lavalink server for music playback (e.g. 'tower.local' or the lavalink container name when using Compose). Leave blank to disable music commands.

Config.Name: Lavalink Port
Config.Description: Port your Lavalink server is listening on. Default is 2333.

Config.Name: Lavalink Password
Config.Description: Lavalink server password (matches the password in your Lavalink application.yml). Required to enable music commands.
